title: 有翼之暗
summary:
Detective Jiro and Kumotsubashi reunite after three and a half months, having last worked together on an arson case. Jiro has arrived at the scene to investigate a murder case involving Mr. Mikage Itou, acting on a request from Mr. Itou. Jingu informs Kumotsubashi that Mr. Horikawa and his team were the first to arrive at the location.

The group enters a spacious entrance hall characterized by high ceilings, a golden chandelier, and a pervasive red color scheme. The various shades of red on the floor, staircase, wallpaper, and furniture create a twilight-like atmosphere. The hall serves as a museum of ancient art, displaying expensive artifacts such as "Eryx's Vessel," "Lacan's Holy Grail," and "Al-Rus' Mermaid."

As the group ascends the red-carpeted stairs toward the second floor, where the crime scene is located, they examine a pair of Italian Renaissance-style decorative armors. Mukai points out a significant anomaly: while the left armor is complete, the right armor is missing its iron boots, leaving the mounting pipes and leather buckles exposed. The group discusses the potential significance of this imbalance and the unfastened buckles. Inspector Tsujimura, a member of the wartime generation, expresses a desire for the case to be straightforward, while others suggest that the contradictions and puzzles will eventually lead to the truth. The group proceeds toward the second floor with the intention of meeting members of the Kumihara family later.
